# row2Column2TextProvider

**Instance Property**

The text to display in the second column of the second row.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var row2Column2TextProvider: CLKTextProvider { get set }
```

## Discussion

When the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationTemplateModularSmallColumnsText/highlightColumn2] property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true], a tint color is applied to this text. In multicolor environments, the text provider or template provide the tint color. In monochrome environments, the clock face provides the tint color.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **row1Column1TextProvider**: The text to display in the first column of the first row.
- **row1Column2TextProvider**: The text to display in the second column of the first row.
- **row2Column1TextProvider**: The text to display in the first column of the second row.
- **column2Alignment**: The alignment of the text in the second column.
- **highlightColumn2**: A Boolean value indicating which column should be drawn with a highlight.
